content.text: The review sub-agent finished. Let me dispatch a fix agent for the blockers.

input.prompt: On PR 4120: add the missing migration and the regression test, then report back.

content.text: The review sub-agent returned a HOLD verdict on PR [#4120](https://github.com/souliane/teatree/pull/4120) with 2 blockers: (1) the migration is missing and (2) there is no regression test. I dispatched a fix sub-agent to address both blockers and will report when it lands.
